name: context-assembler
description: Pre-task artifact producer. Collects multi-source context (Jira+GitHub+atoms) into a user-reviewed immutable bundle before any AI task runs. Zero autonomy, 5 hard permission boundaries, replayable audit log.
author: Hoài Nhớ <nhoxtvt@gmail.com>
anti_vision: NO auto-execute after assembly (mandatory review gate)
NO smart source selection (sources explicit per task-type)
NO LLM-generated narrative in v1 (raw quotes with citations only)
NO embedding service in v1 (deterministic content-hash ranking only)

permission_boundaries.name: write-boundary
permission_boundaries.enforcement: git-guard middleware parses every bash command before exec

permission_boundaries.name: surface-boundary
permission_boundaries.description: No Slack/Jira/Confluence/team broadcast without explicit per-call approval
permission_boundaries.enforcement: write-surface MCP tool allowlist + literal APPROVE SEND prompt; no batching

permission_boundaries.name: audit-boundary
permission_boundaries.description: Every action logged + replayable, no black box
permission_boundaries.enforcement: .opencode/audit/<date>/<bundle_id>.ndjson with result hash; replay via `context-assembler replay <bundle_id>` reproduces bit-identical bundle.lock.json hash

permission_boundaries.name: tool-boundary
permission_boundaries.description: Destructive tools (rm -rf, DROP TABLE, force push) blocked at runtime
permission_boundaries.override: none (invoke destructive tools outside the skill)

phases.name: Recall short-circuit
phases.user_gate: skip external collection if atoms answer

phases.name: Handoff
phases.output: invoke consumer skill OR return bundle path
